# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# Full-object Stellar AI 0.10 / Pegasus 4.4.4 parity overrides.
# Only these three ordinary strategic resources are copied: their non-AI
# fields match vanilla, while ai_wants restores deficit and low-income demand.
# Source: C:/Users/Admin/Documents/GIT/GameMods/StellarisMods/research/mod-source-snapshots/2026-07-04/3610149307-stellar-ai/common/strategic_resources/00_strategic_resources.txt

volatile_motes = {
	tradable = yes
	category = strategic
	market_amount = 10
	market_price = 100
	max = 15000

	prerequisites = {
		OR = {
			tech_mine_volatile_motes
			tech_nomads_mechanized_mining
		}
	}

	deficit_situation = situation_volatile_motes_deficit
	deficit_trade_conversion_mult = -1.25

	culling_conversion_value = 7

	ai_weight = {
		weight = 10
	}

	ai_wants = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 8
			has_deficit = volatile_motes
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 5
			resource_stockpile_compare = { resource = volatile_motes value < 40 }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 2.5
			resource_stockpile_compare = { resource = volatile_motes value < 120 }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 3
			NOT = { has_monthly_income = { resource = volatile_motes value > 1 } }
		}
	}
}

exotic_gases = {
	tradable = yes
	category = strategic
	market_amount = 10
	market_price = 100
	max = 15000

	prerequisites = {
		OR = {
			tech_mine_exotic_gases
			tech_nomads_mechanized_mining
		}
	}

	deficit_situation = situation_exotic_gases_deficit
	deficit_trade_conversion_mult = -1.25

	culling_conversion_value = 7

	ai_weight = {
		weight = 10
	}

	ai_wants = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 8
			has_deficit = exotic_gases
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 5
			resource_stockpile_compare = { resource = exotic_gases value < 40 }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 2.5
			resource_stockpile_compare = { resource = exotic_gases value < 120 }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 3
			NOT = { has_monthly_income = { resource = exotic_gases value > 1 } }
		}
	}
}

rare_crystals = {
	tradable = yes
	category = strategic
	market_amount = 10
	market_price = 100
	max = 15000

	prerequisites = {
		OR = {
			tech_mine_rare_crystals
			tech_nomads_mechanized_mining
		}
	}

	deficit_situation = situation_rare_crystals_deficit
	deficit_trade_conversion_mult = -1.25

	culling_conversion_value = 7

	ai_weight = {
		weight = 10
	}

	ai_wants = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 8
			has_deficit = rare_crystals
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 5
			resource_stockpile_compare = { resource = rare_crystals value < 40 }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 2.5
			resource_stockpile_compare = { resource = rare_crystals value < 120 }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 3
			NOT = { has_monthly_income = { resource = rare_crystals value > 1 } }
		}
	}
}
